title: Baby Bio Houseplant Drip Feeders, 4 x 40ml - Ready To Use House Plant Food - Easy Care Fertiliser for Supporting Healthy Growth and Vibrant Blooms - Automatic Plant Feeder
features: AUTOMATIC: Give yourself piece of mind that your houseplant is getting a regular dose of the nutrients it needs with the Baby Bio Houseplant Food Drip Feeder
LEAVING WITHOUT WORRY: Offers convenient, worry-free care of your houseplant
EASY TO USE: Each drip feeder lasts for up to 1 month, and is easy to use. Simply cut the tip off and place it tip down in the soil
SEASONAL: Use during the growing season for healthy and vibrant blooms that make your houseplant look it's best
INDOOR USE: For use with houseplants in your home or conservatory for best results
description: From the manufacturer EFFORTLESS NUTRITION FOR HEALTHIER, VIBRANT HOUSEPLANTS EFFICIENT & EFFECTIVE Building on all the benefits of the original Baby Bio Houseplant Food, this ready-to-use drip feeder offers an easy and efficient way to provide your plants with a consistent supply of essential nutrients. Designed for convenience, it steadily releases the right amount of nourishment to support healthy growth, ensuring your plants enjoy greener, more vibrant leaves and beautiful blooms. 4 WEEKS OF FEED With each feeder lasting up to 4 weeks, and no need for measuring or mixing, the drip feeder makes plant care simpler, allowing you to maintain strong, thriving houseplants with minimal effort and maximum results. UNIVERSAL SOLUTION Baby Bio has been feeding all houseplant types for over 70 years, from lush greens to delicate orchids, this unique fertiliser ensures balanced nutrition and lasting beauty. An organic formulation containing essential NPK plus seaweed for healthier houseplants. A balanced and nutrient rich formulation infused with seaweed. An easy to use aerosol product that gives your houseplants a natural shine. Contains a new, foliar bug treatment, flupyradifurone for the control of sucking pests, such as aphids, whiteflies and many more. Uniquely formulated NPK to support healthy and flowering orchids.
